title: heliophila pilosa var. incisa
intro: Heliophila pilosa var. incisa, also known as the hairy heliophila, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family, commonly found in South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of Heliophila pilosa var. incisa include its ability to aid in the healing process of minor cuts and scrapes, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including skin irritations and minor injuries.
